ValidationRule.description: Prevent user to save new company without Business Developement region
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
OR( AND(ISNEW(), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), NOT(ISBLANK($User.Secondary_Teams__c)), AND(ISCHANGED(BusinessDevelopmentRegion__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(BusinessDevelopmentRegion__c)))),
AND(ISBLANK(TEXT(BusinessDevelopmentRegion__c)), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c)),
AND(ISNEW(), NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), ISPICKVAL($User.Team__c, ''), ISBLANK(TEXT(BusinessDevelopmentRegion__c))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please enter a Business Development Region to save this new company.
